nav.register_desc: Sign up to actively participate in the civic life of Bordj El Kiffan.
nav.register_success: Registration submitted. Waiting for administrator validation.

home.hero_badge: Municipality of Bordj El Kiffan — Algiers
home.hero_desc: Report your concerns, propose solutions, participate in projects and actively contribute to the development of your municipality.
home.hero_devize: « Together for the good of citizens and the country »
home.cta_desc: Over {{count}} citizens already participate. Your voice matters!
home.modules_desc: Choose the space that matches your commitment
home.module_signalements_desc: Report road, lighting, cleanliness issues and more.
home.module_propositions_desc: Submit your improvement ideas and vote for the best ones.
home.module_projets_desc: Join concrete projects and contribute to their realization.
home.module_entraide_desc: Offer or receive material, moral or professional help.

footer.brand_desc: Participatory platform serving the citizens of Bordj El Kiffan to report, propose and contribute to the development of their municipality.
footer.devize: « Together for the good of citizens and the country »
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Citizen Portal of Bordj El Kiffan. All rights reserved.
footer.made_with: Made with ❤️ for the citizens of BEK

guide.title: Citizen Guide
guide.desc: Everything you need to know to use the Bordj El Kiffan Citizen Portal
guide.s1_desc: Open your browser on any device (PC, tablet, smartphone) and go to the link.
guide.s1_step3: The homepage displays with the navigation bar at the top
guide.s1_tip: The site takes ~30s to wake up if no one has visited for 15 min (free tier). Refresh once after 30s.
guide.s2_desc: Declare an issue in the municipality: roads, lighting, cleanliness, safety, etc.
guide.s3_desc: Suggest an improvement for the municipality and get support from other citizens.
guide.s4_desc: Join ongoing citizen projects: municipal park, library, digital training...
guide.s5_desc: Offer your volunteering, expertise, or ask the community for a hand.
guide.s6_desc: Make a donation to support the portal and its citizen actions.
guide.s7_desc: Become an official member of the BEK community to access your personal dashboard.
guide.s8_desc: Promote your business or activity to the entire BEK community.
guide.faq_desc: Answers to the most common questions.
guide.cta_desc: Join the citizens making a difference in Bordj El Kiffan
